title: Render Text Page Image
cap_description: Render a page-like PNG image preview of the text document
documentation:
## Purpose

Renders a plain text file as a page-like PNG image — monospaced font, line-by-line layout. Useful for generating visual previews of text documents, configuration files, or output logs for display in image-aware contexts.

## Inputs

- A plain text file (path or stdin).
- Page width in pixels (default 800).
- Page height in pixels (default 1200).

## Outputs

A PNG image representing the rendered text page.

## Notes

- Long files will overflow the page height. Consider truncating or paginating the input if you need multi-page output.
- For log files specifically, use [Render Log Page Image](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:log;textable";op=render_page_image;out="media:image;png") which may apply syntax-aware formatting.

args.arg_description: Path to the text file to process
Width of the page image in pixels
Height of the page image in pixels

output.output_description: PNG image data representing the rendered text page
